popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Ralph Hemenway (1603-1678)
popularStory.description:
RALPH HEMENWAY 
1603-1678

According to the History of Framingham, Massachusetts by J. H. Temple, Ralph Hemenway was of Roxbury, Massachusetts in 1633 (about age 30), a church member and freeman. Roxb …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes於1603年4月24日出生在英國賀特福爾賀特福德時，她的父親John Hewes19歲，母親Mary Foote11600歲。她於1634年7月5日與Ralph Hemenway在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1652年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。她去世於1685年2月2日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利享年81歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes于1603年4月24日出生在英国賀特福爾賀特福德时，她的父亲John Hewes19岁，母亲Mary Foote11600岁。她于1634年7月5日与Ralph Hemenway在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1652年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。她去世于1685年2月2日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利享年81岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hewes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hughes
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Holbrook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’, such as Holbrook (Derbyshire, Dorset, Suffolk) and Howbrook in Wortley (Yorkshire).
Americanized form of North German Halbrock (or some like-sounding surname), a cognate of 1 above.

History: This name was first taken to America by the brothers Thomas and John Holbrook, who emigrated to MA in the 17th century; their line can be traced back to Dundry, Somerset, England, in the first half of the 16th century. Other English bearers who started early lines of descent in the New World are Joseph Ho(u)lbrook of Warrington, Lancashire, who emigrated to MD as an indentured servant in the later 17th century; Randolph Holbrook, who was in VA in the 1720s but later returned to Nantwich, Cheshire; and Rev. John Holbrook, who emigrated from Handbury, Staffordshire, to NJ c. 1723.

variants.name: Holbrooks
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Holbrook , with excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Haulbrook
meanings: Altered form of English   Holbrook  , reflecting the southern US pronunciation of the name.

variants.name: Halbrook
meanings: English: variant of   Holbrook  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

historicEvents.description: Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes was born on 24 April 1603, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, her father, John Hewes, was 19 and her mother, Mary Foote, was 11600. She married Ralph Hemenway on 5 July 1634, in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1652. She died on 2 February 1685, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 81, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes est née le 24 avril 1603, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hewes, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mary Foote, avait 11600 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Hemenway le 5 juillet 1634, à Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1652. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1685, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes am 24. April 1603 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hewes 19 und ihre Mutter Mary Foote 11600. Sie hat am 5. Juli 1634 in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Ralph Hemenway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1652 hat sie in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1685 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes è nata il il 24 aprile 1603 nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, John Hewes, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mary Foote, aveva 11600 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Hemenway il 5 luglio 1634, nel Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1652. Morì il 2 febbraio 1685, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Holbrook Hewesが1603年4月24日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで生まれた時，父John Hewesは19歳，母Mary Footeは11600歳であった。1634年7月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーでRalph Hemenwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1652年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼女は1685年2月2日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーで81歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes(이)가 1603년 4월 24일 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hewes(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Foote(은)는 11600세였다. 그녀는 1634년 7월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 Ralph Hemenway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1652년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 살았다. 그녀는 1685년 2월 2일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes nasceu em 24 de abril de 1603, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hewes, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mary Foote, tinha 11600 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Hemenway em 5 de julho de 1634, em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1652. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1685, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes родилась 24 апреля 1603 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hewes было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Foote, 11600. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Hemenway 5 июля 1634 г. в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1652 году. Она умерла 2 февраля 1685 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Holbrook Hewes nació el 24 de abril de 1603, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hewes, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mary Foote, tenía 11600 años. Se casó con Ralph Hemenway el 5 de julio de 1634, en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1652. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1685, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
